title: cyanea coriacea var. fauriei
intro: Cyanea coriacea var. fauriei, also known as the Kaua'i silversword, is a rare and unique plant species endemic to the Hawaiian island of Kaua'i. It belongs to the Asteraceae family and is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and is also valued for its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Traditional herbal preparations of Cyanea coriacea var. fauriei include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water or boiling them in a tea.
